entries.title: TypeScript Dead Type Overlay
entries.notes: Leverages TypeScript compiler API to scan loaded pages and overlay unused types in devtools. Quick build with mature tooling. Fills the gap between linting (pre-commit) and runtime debugging.
entries.pain: Developers ship unused TypeScript types that bloat bundles and cause confusing runtime errors.

entries.title: Competitor Site Visit Alert
entries.notes: First-party tracking pixel injected via browser extension detects visits to competitor domains. No GDPR friction since it's opt-in. Unique angle vs saturated third-party intent tools.
entries.pain: Sales reps miss the best time to reach prospects who are actively evaluating competitors.

entries.title: Slack Unread Audio Digest
entries.notes: Uses Web Speech API to convert unread Slack messages to audio on-demand. Trivial build with mature TTS APIs. Solves a real hands-free consumption gap.
entries.pain: Knowledge workers skip important Slack messages because they cannot read while driving or exercising.

entries.title: Notion Change Audit Trail
entries.notes: Polls Notion API for page revision history and surfaces changes in a floating panel. Simple integration. Teams using Notion as docs infrastructure need this badly.
entries.pain: Teams lose track of who changed what in Notion, making compliance audits and conflict resolution painful.

entries.title: GCP Bill Spike Sentinel
entries.notes: Statistical anomaly detection on GCP billing exports with browser notifications. Uses GCP Billing API. High demand as companies scale cloud spend.
entries.pain: Engineers get blindsided by unexpected GCP bills when anomalies go undetected until month-end.

entries.title: Meeting Action Pre-Loader
entries.notes: Extracts action items from Google Calendar invites and surfaces them prominently before meetings. Calendar API makes this trivial. Strong daily utility.
entries.pain: Attendees miss action items from calendar invites because they only skim the description before meetings.

entries.title: PyPI Safety Score Overlay
entries.notes: Overlays PyPI metadata, last publish date, and known vulnerabilities when visiting package pages. Leverages PyPI JSON API. Supply chain security is top-of-mind.
entries.pain: Developers risk supply chain attacks by installing PyPI packages without checking maintenance health.

entries.title: SaaS Pricing Tier Monitor
entries.notes: Scheduled scraping of competitor pricing pages with diff alerts. Browser extension gives easy opt-in data collection. Direct competitor intelligence gap.
entries.pain: Sales teams waste time manually checking competitor pricing pages that change without notice.

entries.title: Job Listing Tech Fingerprint
entries.notes: Extracts and normalizes tech mentions from job posting pages using NLP. Scrapes job boards for enrichment data. Saves hours of manual research.
entries.pain: AEs spend hours reading job postings to infer prospect tech stacks for personalized outreach.

entries.title: Postgres Explain Visualizer
entries.notes: Renders PostgreSQL query plans as interactive tree diagrams directly in the browser. Parses standard EXPLAIN format. Database devs desperately need better tooling.
entries.pain: Developers struggle to parse raw PostgreSQL EXPLAIN ANALYZE output when optimizing slow queries.

entries.title: Webhook Delivery Heatmap
entries.notes: Visualizes webhook success/failure rates as a calendar heatmap from captured network traffic. No backend needed. Built entirely in-browser.
entries.pain: Devs cannot see webhook delivery patterns over time without custom logging infrastructure.

entries.title: CI Failure Category Tagger
entries.notes: Classifies CI failure logs by error type and suggests owners based on git blame. Integrates with GitHub Actions API. Speeds up incident response significantly.
entries.pain: Developers waste hours triaging CI failures because logs lack categorization and prioritization.

entries.title: CSS Layer Winner Inspector
entries.notes: Visualizes which cascade layers are winning for any element with a breakdown panel. Built on existing DevTools protocol. Chrome 99+ support makes this timely.
entries.pain: Debugging CSS cascade layer conflicts requires manually tracing specificity across dozens of files.

entries.title: Sales Deck Slide Momentum Score
entries.notes: Tracks time spent on each slide in browser-based decks and benchmarks against top-performing reps. Screen time API enables this. Competitive intelligence for sales.
entries.pain: Sales reps do not know which slides resonate versus which ones lose buyer attention in demos.

entries.title: Tab Resource Drain Monitor
entries.notes: Per-tab CPU and memory usage displayed in a sidebar with one-click tab suspension. Browser Task Manager API enables this. Simple daily utility tool.
entries.pain: Users have dozens of tabs open consuming memory but no easy way to see which ones are wasteful.
